name: system-design-doc
description: Create standardized 10-section system design documents (22 commands) — split per-section layout (default) + machine-readable registry schema 2.3.0. Supports Reverse Engineering, Import Plan, 8-phase Brainstorming, Mermaid diagrams, sitemap.json graph (8 node types, R31-R35), and AC/UC source of truth for qa-ui-test traceability. Integrates with ui-mockup, long-running, qa-ui-test. See README for full changelog.
